parameters.content: ## V1.0 Hardened — Process Campaigns and Artists

parameters.jsCode: const item=items[0];const body=item.json.body||{};const dataArray=body.data||[];const fieldsByKey={};const fieldsList=[];function normalizeValue(f){const v=f.value;if(v===null||v===undefined)return null;if(Array.isArray(v)){const urls=v.map(x=>(x&&typeof x==='object'?x.url:null)).filter(Boolean);return urls.length>0?urls:v;}if(typeof v==='object'){if(v.url)return v.url;return v;}return v;}for(const field of dataArray){if(!field)continue;const title=field.title||'';const type=field.type||'';const customKey=field.custom_key||null;const key=field.key||null;const identifier=customKey||key;const normalizedValue=normalizeValue(field);const fieldEntry={title,key,custom_key:customKey,type,value:normalizedValue,raw:field};if(identifier){fieldsByKey[identifier]=fieldEntry;}fieldsList.push({title,key,custom_key:customKey,type,value:normalizedValue});}return[{json:{form_id:body.form_id,slug:body.slug,submission_id:body.submission_id,created_at:body.created_at,fieldsByKey,fieldsList,device:body.device,charge:body.charge,pdfs:body.pdfs}}];

assignments.name: Admin Notification Subject
assignments.value: ={{ $json['Admin Notification Subject'].replace('[[campaign_name]]', $('Normalize Fields by Key').item.json.fieldsByKey.campaign.value || '').replace('[[artist_first_name]]', $('Normalize Fields by Key').item.json.fieldsByKey.first_name.value || '').replace('[[artist_last_name]]', $('Normalize Fields by Key').item.json.fieldsByKey.last_name.value || '') }}

assignments.name: Admin Notification Body
assignments.value: ={{ $json['Admin Notification Body'].replaceAll('[[campaign_name]]', $('Normalize Fields by Key').item.json.fieldsByKey.campaign.value || '').replaceAll('[[artist_first_name]]', $('Normalize Fields by Key').item.json.fieldsByKey.first_name.value || '').replaceAll('[[artist_last_name]]', $('Normalize Fields by Key').item.json.fieldsByKey.last_name.value || '') }}

parameters.sendTo: ={{ $('Notification Email Prep for Admins and Submitter').item.json['Admin Notification Email Addresses'] }}
parameters.subject: ={{ $('Notification Email Prep for Admins and Submitter').item.json['Admin Notification Subject'] }}

assignments.name: Active Campaign Lists To Add To

parameters.jsCode: const contactItem=$input.first().json;const contactId=contactItem.id;const prepJson=$node['Prep Active Campaign'].json;let lists=prepJson['Active Campaign Lists To Add To']||prepJson['Active Campaign Lists']||[];if(!Array.isArray(lists)){lists=[];}const items=lists.map(str=>{const match=String(str).match(/ListID=(\d+)/);return match?match[1]:null;}).filter(id=>id!==null).map(listId=>({json:{contactId,listId}}));return items;

nodes.name: Extract AC List IDs To Add To

parameters.jsCode: const prepJson=$node['Prep Active Campaign'].json;const tagString=prepJson['Active Campaign Tags To Add']||'';const tags=String(tagString).split(',').map(t=>t.trim()).filter(t=>t.length>0);return tags.map(tag=>({json:{tag}}));

nodes.name: Extract Tags to Add to AC1

parameters.jsCode: const prepJson=$node['Prep Active Campaign'].json;const tagString=prepJson['Active Campaign Tags To Add']||'';const desiredTags=String(tagString).split(',').map(t=>t.trim()).filter(t=>t.length>0);const contactData=$node['Create a contact'].json;const contactId=contactData.contact?.id||contactData.id;const allACTags=$('Get All AC Tags').all().map(item=>item.json);return desiredTags.map(tagName=>{const match=allACTags.find(t=>(t.tag||t.name||'').toLowerCase()===tagName.toLowerCase());return{json:{tagName,tagId:match?(match.id||null):null,needsCreation:!match,contactId:String(contactId)}};});
